R.R. GRAY, DIRECTOR
GSCCA CIRCULAR 1 OF 2013
Pre-reminders
Following a review of internal procedures, the decision has been taken to cease issuing pre-
reminders prior to the June due date for payment. This is in part due to the decision taken last
year, to delay the issue of the interim (estimated assessments) until the last two weeks in
May.
As previously advised, reminders will continue to be issued approximately two weeks prior to
the December payment date, which would then be followed up with court letters if the
payment had not been made by the due date. Accountants would receive copies of the
reminders issued.
R R GRAY
Director
31 May 2013
category: Information circulated to Guernsey Society of Chartered & Certified Accountants:
